en.extract:
The red-throated cliff swallow (Petrochelidon rufigula), also known as the red-throated swallow, is a species of bird in the family Hirundinidae.  It is found in Angola, Republic of the Congo, DRC, Gabon, and Zambia.

The '''red-throated cliff swallow''' ('''''Petrochelidon rufigula'''''), also known as the '''red-throated swallow''', is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Hirundinidae]].  It is found in [[Angola]], [[Republic of the Congo]], [[Democratic Republic of the Congo|DRC]], [[Gabon]], and [[Zambia]].
